What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Thick smoke rises from damaged buildings in a city street. Men holding rifles stand on a green military tank. A white neoclassical building with columns stands with an American flag waving on a pole. People walk on the pavement in front of the structure while text overlays display news headlines about a travel ban and Sanaa, Yemen.

canonical_answer: At 0s, smoke rises from damaged buildings in Sanaa with text about a killed president; at 2s, men holding rifles gather in a street courtyard; at 4s, armed men stand on top of a green military tank; at 10s, text graphics appear stating the Supreme Court allows a travel ban; at 12s, the Supreme Court building appears with an American flag waving.
